stories.title: Home Opener vs Mets — First Weekend at Wrigley

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Home opener day.

Mets in town for three. Wrigley ready. 1:20 PM first pitch.

After a series win in Philly, this is the real start of the season for the North Side.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Pitching Crisis — Horton and Hodge Both Lost for the Season

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The rotation and bullpen just got gutted.

Cade Horton: season-ending UCL surgery yesterday.
Porter Hodge: season-ending UCL surgery next week.
Justin Steele: still months away.

Three arms gone. And this team is still winning series.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: The Offense Is Humming — Hoerner, Swanson, Shaw All Clicking

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Cubs offense is humming.

Hoerner: career-high 5 RBIs Wednesday.
Swanson: HR + clutch at-bats.
Shaw: 3 doubles in one game.

When this lineup clicks, the pitching losses become survivable. Right now they're clicking.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Game Preview — Cabrera vs Senga at Wrigley

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Home opener vs the Mets. 1:20 PM CT at Wrigley.

Edward Cabrera vs Kodai Senga. Two guys with electric stuff.

Cabrera's quietly been the most reliable arm in this rotation. Pitcher's duel on paper.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Game Time Hype — First Pitch at Wrigley

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Game time at Wrigley in 20 minutes.

Cabrera on the hill vs Senga and the Mets. Homestand opens with a bang.

Coming off a series win in Philly. Offense rolling. Bullpen duct-taped together. Let's go.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Minor League Watch — Wiggins on the MiLB IL

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Jaxon Wiggins: 7-day Minor League IL, right elbow inflammation.

The top Cubs pitching prospect last threw April 4 for Iowa. Counsell says it's precautionary — arm just needed rest.

Another Cubs arm to monitor.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Evening Perspective — The Cubs Keep Winning Anyway

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Slow down and zoom out on the Cubs:

Three starters gone. Four relievers on the IL. And they keep winning series.

That's not luck. That's a roster built to grind through the hard weeks.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB
